remember: Recall the different types of training in sports such as specific, general, endurance, strength, speed, agility, flexibility, and power training.
List the objectives of specific training in various sports.
Identify the importance of periodization in training schedules.
understand: Explain the concept of general adaptation syndrome and its application in sports training.
Describe the differences between endurance, strength, speed, agility, flexibility, and power training.
Discuss the role of nutrition and recovery in sports training.
apply: Design a specific training program for a particular sport or event.
Develop a periodized training schedule for an athlete.
Analyze the strengths and weaknesses of an athlete and plan a training program accordingly.
analyze: Evaluate the effectiveness of a training program in improving athletic performance.
Analyze the role of psychological factors in sports training and performance.
Compare the training methods of different sports and athletes.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of training in sports and its importance in enhancing athletic performance.
To learn about the different types of training and their objectives in various sports.
To appreciate the role of periodization in training schedules and its application in sports training.
board_exam_objectives: To understand the importance of training in sports and its impact on athletic performance.
To recall the different types of training and their objectives in various sports.
To analyze the effectiveness of a training program and its application in real-life scenarios.
